arabic_text: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
english_translation: A Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hands the Muslims are safe.
The most perfect of believers in faith are those with the best character.

arabic_text: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ
english_translation: Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim.

arabic_text: تَبَسُّمُكَ فِي وَجْهِ أَخِيكَ لَكَ صَدَقَةٌ
english_translation: Your smile for your brother is charity.
